source_target.name: DEMO_DO_NOT_ORDER_geneart_synthetic_protein
source_target.note: Synthetic tutorial protein. Confirm sequence, expression system, tags, purification target, and vendor representation before any real quote or order.

optimization_target.expression_notes: Use a reviewed protein-to-DNA handoff record for real projects.

notes: Protein expression is quote/handoff-only in GENtle v1.
ClawBio or other callers should use return_spec to state whether they need only amino-acid sequence, codon-targeted DNA, quote metadata, or the full handoff bundle.
